article.title: Russia's Sberbank wants Chinese chips for its GigaChat AI in the face of Western sanctions — faces a long wait behind ByteDance and Alibaba
article.summary: CEO German Gref didn’t specify which Chinese chips Sberbank is interested in, but the most likely candidate is Huawei's Ascend 950 family.
article.title_zh: 俄羅斯Sberbank在面臨西方制裁之際尋求中國晶片用於其GigaChat AI——在ByteDance和Alibaba之後面臨漫長等待
article.summary_zh: CEO German Gref未具體說明Sberbank對哪些中國晶片感興趣，但最可能的候選是華為的Ascend 950系列。

article.title: China banned Nvidia 5090D V2 while CEO Jensen Huang was in town, report claims — move comes as Beijing pushes its AI tech companies to use homegrown chips
article.summary: The RTX 5090D V2 GPU Nvidia specifically built for China to comply with U.S. export controls just received the ban hammer from Beijing. Although this GPU is primarily designed for gaming and 3D animation, it's also powerful enough that many AI developers also use it.
article.title_zh: 據報中國在CEO Jensen Huang到訪期間禁止Nvidia 5090D V2——此舉適逢北京推動其AI科技公司使用國產晶片
article.summary_zh: RTX 5090D V2 GPU是Nvidia專為中國量身打造以符合美國出口管制的產品，剛剛遭到北京的禁令。儘管該GPU主要用於遊戲和3D動畫，但其強大的效能也使許多AI開發者使用它。

article.title: Huawei bans leave fiber operators with little choice besides Nokia
article.summary: Operators looking for broadband access network products are limited to Nokia and much smaller vendors in countries that have banned Chinese suppliers.
article.title_zh: 華為禁令迫使光纖運營商別無選擇只能選擇 Nokia
article.summary_zh: 在禁用中國供應商的國家，尋求寬帶接入網絡產品的運營商僅限於選擇 Nokia 和規模較小的供應商。

article.title: Madison Square Garden Bans Lawyer Representing New York Cop Injured at a Boxing Match
article.summary: Attorney John Scola is representing a police officer who is suing over injuries allegedly sustained while working security at an MSG property in 2025.
article.title_zh: Madison Square Garden 禁止代理在拳擊賽中受傷紐約警察的律師
article.summary_zh: 律師 John Scola 代理一名警察，該警察因在 2025 年於 MSG 場所執行安保工作期間遭受的傷害而提起訴訟。

article.title: US Treasury Sanctions Drug Traffickers For Laundering Profits via Crypto
article.summary: The US Treasury Department announced sanctions against an operative for the Sinaloa Cartel who it says uses cryptocurrency to funnel drug-trafficking proceeds back into Mexico.
article.title_zh: 美國財政部制裁通過加密貨幣洗錢的毒梟
article.summary_zh: 美國財政部宣佈對錫那羅亞販毒集團的一名特工進行制裁，該特工據稱使用加密貨幣將毒品販運所得收益轉回墨西哥。

article.title: China banned RTX 5090D V2 while Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang was visiting
article.summary: Beijing banned an Nvidia gaming chip while the company’s chief executive, Jensen Huang, was visiting China with Donald Trump last week, the latest salvo in the superpowers’ battle to dominate AI. The chip was added to a list of banned goods at China’s customs checkpoints last Friday, according to a copy of the document seen by the FT and two people with knowledge of the matter. The move highlights Beijing’s determination to keep out Nvidia’s chips, especially the degraded versions made to comply with US export controls. The Chinese government wants to support domestic chipmakers such as Huawei and Cambricon as they catch up to their US rivals. Read full article Comments
article.title_zh: Nvidia CEO黃仁勳訪華期間中國禁止RTX 5090D V2
article.summary_zh: 北京在Nvidia執行長黃仁勳上週與唐納德·特朗普訪華期間禁止該公司的一款遊戲芯片，這是超級大國爭奪AI主導地位鬥爭的最新一步。

article.title: Google gets ‘intelligent’ Search box redesign, information agents, mini apps, & more
article.summary: Google Search received big updates at I/O 2026. For starters, AI Mode is now powered by Gemini 3.5 Flash globally and has over 1 billion users every month. more…
article.title_zh: Google 推出「智能」搜尋框重新設計、信息代理、迷你應用等功能
article.summary_zh: Google Search 在 I/O 2026 進行了大幅更新，AI Mode 現由 Gemini 3.5 Flash 全球驅動，擁有超 10 億月度用戶。

article.title: How to use Google’s new AI agents to go beyond your standard searches
article.summary: Google is launching AI-powered “information agents” that can monitor topics in the background and proactively alert users to updates and changes.
article.title_zh: 如何使用 Google 的新 AI agents 進行超越標準搜尋的操作
article.summary_zh: Google 正推出 AI 驅動的「資訊 agents」，可在背景監控主題並主動提醒用戶更新和變化。

article.title: Google just redesigned the search box for the first time in 25 years — here’s why it matters more than you think.
article.summary: For a quarter century, the Google search box has been one of the most recognizable interfaces in computing: a thin white rectangle, a blinking cursor, a few typed words, and a list of blue links. On Tuesday, Google will formally retire that paradigm. At its annual I/O developer conference , Google announced a sweeping redesign of the search box itself — the literal text field where billions of queries begin every day — transforming it from a simple keyword input into a dynamic, AI-driven conversation starter that can accept text, images, PDFs, videos, and even open Chrome tabs as inputs. The company is also merging its AI Overviews and AI Mode features into a single, seamless search flow, eliminating the friction that previously forced users to choose between a traditional results page and
article.title_zh: Google 剛剛在 25 年來首次重新設計搜尋框——以下是為什麼這比你想像的更重要
article.summary_zh: 四分之一世紀以來，Google 搜尋框一直是計算中最易識別的介面之一：一個薄白色矩形、閃爍的遊標、幾個輸入的字和一個藍色連結列表。週二，Google 將正式淘汰這一範式。

article.title: Gemini app rolling out ‘Neural Expressive’ redesign, 3.5 Flash, 24/7 Spark agent, & Daily Brief
article.summary: At I/O 2026, Google announced major updates to Gemini across the underlying model and new app features. The Gemini app now has over 900 million monthly active users. more…
article.title_zh: Gemini 應用推出「Neural Expressive」重新設計、3.5 Flash、全天候 Spark 代理和每日簡報
article.summary_zh: Google 在 I/O 2026 宣布 Gemini 的重大更新，Gemini 應用現擁有超 9 億月度活躍用戶。

article.title: Google turns Gemini into a proactive AI agent with Spark, Daily Brief, and a major redesign
article.summary: Credit: Adamya Sharma / Android Authority TL;DR Google is rolling out a redesigned Gemini app with its new “Neural Expressive” design language, richer responses, improved Gemini Live conversations, and support across Android, iOS, and the web. The company also announced new AI agents called Daily Brief and Gemini Spark, with Spark designed to proactively handle tasks across Gmail, Docs, and other connected apps. Gemini Omni is also coming to the Gemini app as a new multimodal model that can generate and edit cinematic videos from text, images, and clips. Google just announced one of the biggest overhauls to the Gemini app yet at Google I/O 2026, introducing a redesigned interface, proactive AI agents, and a powerful new video generation model called Gemini Omni.
article.title_zh: Google 通過 Spark、Daily Brief 和重大重新設計將 Gemini 轉變為主動式 AI 代理
article.summary_zh: Google 推出重新設計的 Gemini 應用，採用「Neural Expressive」設計語言，並推出 Daily Brief 和 Spark 等新 AI 代理。

article.title: Google’s excellent offline AI app just got even better with three big features
article.summary: Credit: Andy Walker / Android Authority TL;DR Google has brought several new features to its AI Edge Gallery app. The on-device AI app now offers chat history and notification reminders. The app also supports the MCP feature, so it can interact with other apps and services like Maps and email. Google’s AI Edge Gallery app allows you to easily download and run AI models on-device, making it handy if you want a more private and versatile AI experience. However, the search giant is bringing even more improvements to the app as part of its I/O developer conference. For starters, Google announced that AI Edge Gallery on Android now supports the Model Context Protocol (MCP) feature. MCP is an open-source protocol that offers a standardized way for on-device AI models to interact with other apps
article.title_zh: Google 優秀的離線 AI 應用透過三項大功能變得更好
article.summary_zh: Google 為其 AI Edge Gallery 應用新增多項功能，包括聊天歷史和通知提醒。該應用也支援 MCP 功能，可與 Maps 和電子郵件等其他應用和服務互動。

article.title: Android Auto is getting massive music app redesigns, starting with these apps [Gallery]
article.summary: Alongside various other announcements at Google I/O 2026, we’re getting a deeper preview of major media app changes on Android Auto, as well as a list of apps that will be adopting the changes first. more…
article.title_zh: Android Auto 推出大規模音樂應用重新設計
article.summary_zh: Google 在 I/O 2026 預覽了 Android Auto 上主要媒體應用的重大更新，並列出首批採納新設計的應用。

article.title: Gemini 3.5 Flash is here: Google’s smartest speed model promises better coding and agents
article.summary: TL;DR At Google I/O 2026, Google has introduced the Gemini 3.5 family of AI models, starting with Gemini 3.5 Flash. Gemini 3.5 Flash is said to be four times faster than competing frontier models and outperforms Gemini 3.1 Pro on coding and agentic benchmarks. Gemini 3.5 Flash is rolling out globally as the default model for billions of users in the Gemini app and Google Search. Gemini is one of the best AI models around, with each release being widely applauded for pushing the envelope of what end users can achieve with AI. Google released Gemini 3 in November 2025, followed by Gemini 3.1 in February 2026. Today at Google I/O 2026, Google is releasing Gemini 3.5 to the world, starting with Gemini 3.5 Flash, which is already rolling out to billions of users globally.
article.title_zh: Gemini 3.5 Flash 發佈：Google 最快速的智能模型承諾更好的代碼編寫和代理功能
article.summary_zh: Google 在 I/O 2026 推出 Gemini 3.5 Flash，速度快 4 倍，在編碼和代理基準測試中超越 Gemini 3.1 Pro。

article.title: Google flips Antigravity into an agentic dev suite, AI Studio app lands on Android
article.summary: With Gemini 3.5 Flash doing frontier-level work at a fraction of the cost, Google’s Antigravity 2.0 is here to help build and manage your agents and let them loose on your latest projects. Meanwhile, AI Studio is gaining a dedicated Android app to execute on your ideas while on the go. more…
article.title_zh: Google 將 Antigravity 改造為代理開發套件，AI Studio 應用登陸 Android
article.summary_zh: Google 推出 Antigravity 2.0 協助建構和管理代理，同時 AI Studio 推出 Android 應用版本供隨時隨地使用。

article.title: Chinese telcos join the AI token party
article.summary: Operators seek to monetize their compute infrastructure with consumer and SME tokens.
article.title_zh: 中國電信運營商加入 AI token 行列
article.summary_zh: 運營商尋求通過消費者和中小企業 tokens 實現計算基礎設施的商業化。
